---
name: Add a resource
about: Suggest a new resource for the list
title: '[Add] '
labels: add-resource
---

## Resource

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Section it belongs in:** (Arrival / Visa / Housing / Money / Healthcare / Family / Work / Korean Language / Culture / Pets / Government / Other)
- **Language:** (English / Korean / Vietnamese / Filipino / Russian / Chinese / multilingual)

## Why this is worth adding

One or two sentences on what it covers and who it helps.

## How you verified it

How you know the resource is accurate and currently maintained. Bonus points for linking the primary source it's based on.

## Checklist

- [ ] It's free or freemium (not paywalled-only).
- [ ] It's currently maintained (updated within the last 18 months).
- [ ] It's not just a real estate listing or ad-driven blog.
- [ ] I'm not affiliated with the resource, or I've disclosed the affiliation above.
